title: To My Future Sister ❤️
body:
Dear Hari,

If you're reading this years from now, I hope life has been kind to you. I hope you've achieved the dreams you've worked so hard for, found happiness in the little things, and become the strong, independent woman you've always wanted to be.

I know life won't always be easy. There will be days when things don't go as planned, when you'll feel tired, disappointed, or even question yourself. On those days, I hope you remember how strong you truly are. You've overcome so many little challenges already, and I know you'll overcome every big one that comes your way too.

I hope one day we'll laugh while looking back at these photos and videos, wondering where all these years disappeared. Time moves so quickly, but the memories we've created together will never fade.

No matter where life takes us—whether we're living in different cities, busy with our own careers, or surrounded by new responsibilities—I never want us to become strangers. I hope we always find time for random phone calls, silly jokes, festival celebrations, birthday cake cuttings, and those conversations that somehow make everything feel okay again.

Thank you for taking care of me during my difficult days, especially when my hand was fractured. Thank you for being the one who came to me first after our arguments. Thank you for being patient with my stubbornness, laughing at my terrible jokes, and filling my childhood with memories I'll treasure forever.

I don't know what the future holds, but I do know one thing with complete certainty—you will always have a younger brother who is proud of you, believes in you, and silently prays for your happiness every single day.

May your life be filled with peace, success, good health, endless laughter, beautiful adventures, and people who value you just as much as you deserve.

And whenever life feels overwhelming, come back to this little website. Remember these memories. Remember these smiles. Remember that there will always be someone cheering for you, no matter where you are.

Happy Birthday, Hari.

Thank you for being the wonderful sister you've always been.

With endless love,
Your Annoying Little Brother ❤️
